profile.name: Rakshit Agarwal
profile.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
profile.heroBio: Full-stack engineer with 3+ years building scalable SaaS products across fintech, healthcare, and enterprise domains. I've shipped multi-tenant platforms serving 10,000+ users, microservices with NATS and Kafka, and AI-powered features with Gemini — with wins like 60% faster deploys, 50% faster check-ins, and sub-200ms real-time bidding.
aboutBio: B.Tech in Computer Science (ABES Engineering College, 2019). I've grown from building real-time auction backends at Globalvox to engineering enterprise EHS/ESG and fintech SaaS at Brainerhub — working across React, Next.js, Node.js, microservices, and databases from MongoDB and Neo4j to PostgreSQL.

I build production systems end to end: API gateways, event-driven messaging with NATS, Stripe subscription billing, Gemini AI assistants, and CI/CD pipelines that cut deployment time by 60%. I've led frontend for healthcare and event products, reduced state-management bugs by 40%, and shipped real-time features with Socket.IO. I also run a technical YouTube channel — clear communication matters as much as clean code.

projects.label: Project 1
highlights: Engineering features for a multi-tenant enterprise SaaS platform spanning EHS, ESG, Risk, and Compliance management
Built distributed microservices behind an API gateway with a micro-frontend UI layer, using MongoDB and Neo4j
Integrated NATS as a low-latency messaging backbone for event-driven inter-service communication, improving throughput and decoupling services
Implemented real-time chat with Socket.IO and voice-input data sharing for instant, low-latency user responses

projects.label: Project 2
highlights: Architected an end-to-end fintech SaaS application (Next.js full-stack) with automated CI/CD — cut deployment time by 60%
Integrated Gemini AI into an in-app assistant for instant summaries of pending work, task details, and client insights
Built Stripe subscription billing (Free / Pro / Team tiers) with Canada tax compliance and automated invoicing
Consolidated API and data layers into a unified Next.js codebase, reducing cross-team onboarding time by 30%
Led frontend development of an event-listing platform and admin portal, streamlining 5+ concurrent event workflows
Delivered payment processing and analytics dashboards for a ticketing platform — supported 1,000+ ticket transactions
Built automated barcode scanning for ticket validation, cutting check-in time by 50% and reducing queue wait times
Led frontend architecture for the Bering Health patient portal, serving 10,000+ users with performant React/Next.js experiences
Built multi-step patient onboarding with embedded video consultations, reducing drop-off by 25%
Engineered an API integration layer using Redux Toolkit and custom React hooks, cutting state-management bugs by 40%
Developed the backend for a real-time online auction platform, powering dynamic pricing and live bidding workflows
Designed core auction mechanics with member-exclusive workflows, enabling sub-200ms bid-transaction response times
Built a scalable Node.js backend with Redis caching and Socket.IO, supporting live bid updates across 100+ simultaneous auction rooms

projects.title: Blog App with Microservices
projects.description: Production-ready blog platform built on microservices with RabbitMQ, Redis, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Docker. Implements event-driven cache invalidation, Google OAuth, and scalable service design. Deployed on AWS EC2 with clean architecture built for real-world performance.

projects.title: Spotify Clone
projects.description: Full-stack music streaming platform using the MERN stack and PostgreSQL with a microservices backend. Covers user authentication, music playback, playlist management, and admin functionalities—designed for better performance, scalability, and a seamless listening experience.

projects.title: Microservices Chat App
projects.description: Scalable real-time chat application built with the MERN stack, RabbitMQ, and microservices architecture. Supports OTP-based authentication and instant messaging across distributed services. Fully deployed on AWS for performance, reliability, and a smooth user experience.

projects.title: Job Portal with Microservices
projects.description: Microservices-based job portal with Apache Kafka powering inter-service communication. Features AI career guidance, resume analysis, recruiter workflows, email notifications, and multi-role registration. Includes subscription tiers, profile enhancements, and secure forgot/reset password flows.

projects.title: Zomato Clone
projects.description: Food delivery platform inspired by Zomato, built with MERN and a microservice-based backend. Supports customers, restaurant owners, and delivery riders with dedicated dashboards, real-time order assignment, live map tracking, WebSockets, secure authentication, and payment integration.
